title: Doc Provenance Sidecar
description: Machine-readable provenance linking a reference page's headings to the source symbols and git commit at which they were verified.

doc.description: Path to the reference page relative to docs/reference/ (e.g. 'core/errors.md')

heading.description: Exact heading text from the .md (after stripping the leading # characters and space)

file.description: Source file path relative to the repo root

symbol.description: Exported name that must be present in the source file

blob.description: Git blob SHA (git hash-object <file>) of this source file's content when last verified. Content-addressed, so a rebase that leaves the file byte-identical never marks it stale.

lines.description: Line range in the source file at the recorded blob content; reproducible via `git cat-file blob <blob>`

retrieved.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) bumped only when a source blob changes for this section
